description: Hotel just off I-95 Exit 129 (and the Florida Turnpike) that advertises 18-wheeler/truck parking, with free Wi-Fi and breakfast.

name: Pat's Tire
description: Commercial and heavy-duty semi truck tire dealer near I-95 (Palm Beach Lakes Blvd area) serving fleets across Palm Beach County from Fort Lauderdale to Port St. Lucie.

description: 24-hour heavy-duty towing and recovery (two 75-ton rotators, airbag recovery) serving I-95 through Jupiter, Stuart, Port St. Lucie and Fort Pierce.

name: C&P Towing and Transport
description: 24-hour heavy and commercial truck towing serving I-95 through Pompano Beach and Broward County (semi, RV, bus and diesel truck towing).
